title: Broadcom agrees to expanded chip deals with Google, Anthropic
summary: Broadcom will produce future versions of Google's AI chips and expanded its deal with Anthropic, demonstrating strong demand for specialized semiconductor manufacturing. This agreement underscores the critical importance of chip supply for scaling large language models. The deals position Broadcom as a major beneficiary of the AI boom.
content: Broadcom said it agreed to produce future versions of Google artificial intelligence chips, and announced an expanded deal with Anthropic.

zh.title: 博通与谷歌和Anthropic达成扩大芯片交易协议
zh.summary: 博通将生产谷歌未来版本的人工智能芯片，并扩大与Anthropic的交易，展示了对专业半导体制造的强劲需求。该协议强调了芯片供应对扩展大型语言模型的关键重要性。这些交易使博通成为人工智能热潮的主要受益者。

title: Asia-Pacific markets open higher as investors assess Trump's mixed messaging on Iran war
summary: Trump renewed threats against Iranian civilian infrastructure while signaling that Iranian leadership is negotiating, creating mixed signals for investors. Asia-Pacific markets rose as investors assessed the possibility of near-term conflict resolution. The 24-hour deadline adds urgency to ongoing diplomatic efforts.
content: Trump renewed threats on targeting Iran's civilian infrastructure if a peace deal is not reached in less than 24 hours, while signaling Iranian leadership is negotiating in earnest.

zh.title: 亚太市场上涨，投资者评估特朗普关于伊朗战争的混合信号
zh.summary: 特朗普更新了对伊朗民用基础设施的威胁，同时表示伊朗领导层正在谈判，为投资者制造了混合信号。亚太市场上涨，因为投资者评估了短期冲突解决的可能性。24小时期限为正在进行的外交努力增加了紧迫性。
